images.caption:
Figure 1:Overview of the\robotoslablightdots.tts backbone. BPE text tokens and
6.25 Hz audio-semantic embeddings share a single LLM stream; each
LLM hidden state conditions the AR-FM head to generate the next
four-frame VAE-latent patch, which is fed back through the semantic
encoder at the next step. The AudioVAE
(Section˜2.2) is trained separately and frozen here.

Figure 2:Attention masks and RoPE position IDs of the AR
flow-matching head (HHblocks of size11,PP/ZZblocks of sizeL=4L\!=\!4).(a)Block-causal training mask over[C|Z][\,C\,|\,Z\,].(b)Per-step inference mask at stepnn,
with the KV-cached history on the left and the newly appended(Hn,Zn)(H_{n},Z_{n})on the right.(c)Position IDs: the train row
is theCCandZZsegments concatenated, with the red marker at
the boundary whereZZ’s positions reset; the inference row placesZnZ_{n}at the same positionsZnZ_{n}occupied in training.
